overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long USAR Daily ETF (USGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of USA Rare Earth, Inc. (Nasdaq: USAR) stock, less fees, and expenses USGG was launched on Jan 13, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
